latestIgtvVideos.title: Thank You @instagram ♥️
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⁣
Yet another major milestone for us. My journey as @WanderWithSky was recently featured at #facebookfuelforindia 2020. I am truly #BornOnInstagram and this platform has fueled my creativity for the last 3 years, given me the #WanderWithSkyArmy and paved way for my passion to travel the world.⁣

latestIgtvVideos.title: 🔥 Winner Winner Chicken Dinner 🔥 Here's the winning film, my life story!
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⁣
When I started I always dreamt of a community that strives on the positive vibes and pushes each other towards greatness, and I am so proud to have you all as a part of the #WanderWithSky community today and call ourselves the #WanderWithSkyArmy ⁣⁣
⁣⁣
This victory is ours, and ours to cherish. Thank you for supporting and loving me couldn't have asked for a better end to the year.⁣⁣

I love you all! ❤️ 
⁣⁣
#KeepExploring #GoProDiscovery #Winner ⁣⁣
⁣

latestIgtvVideos.title: How to shoot Cinematic Videos powered by @lumixindia S5
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
The most asked question is, ‘Sky, how do you create the magic?’, and here’s the answer.⁣ 🤩
⁣
Sharing the process of creating the magic with the new hybrid full-frame mirrorless camera, @lumixindia S5. Talking about the 3 steps I use to shoot, the settings, the shots &  the story ~ the formula to create magic.⁣
⁣
Do comment with how you plan to be using the same?⁣
⁣
@panasonic_india #lumixIndia #goMirrorless #goLimitless #movingimagesforward #lumix #lumixS5  #WanderWithSky⁣

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
PAN INDIA GIVEAWAY! 🇮🇳⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
Rules :⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣

latestIgtvVideos.title: Sach Pass - World's Most Dangerous Road
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⁣⁣⁣
⁣⁣⁣
In this episode, we head out towards the unchartered Sach Pass or Saach pass is a 4,414-metre-high (14,482 ft) mountain pass in Chamba District of Himachal Pradesh, India on the Pir Panjal range of the Himalayas. I started my ride from Khajjiar in the morning and after 120 km we reached Bairagarh this is the last check post near Sach pass from Chamba valley. The pass is open from June or early July to mid-October. The road is narrow and Dangerous It is the gateway to the Pangi Valley. This is one of the most dangerous and deadliest roads of India.⁣
⁣
#WanderWithSky ⁣#SachPass #GoProHero9 #GoPro #GoProIndia

latestIgtvVideos.title: 🔥LIFE UPDATE - We got #Verified 🔥
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⁣
⁣
This picture, the thumbnail⁣
of this video is from where it all started, I was in the streets of Rome. Backpacking with my brother, this was my country no. 2 ⁣
⁣
Little did I know thay travelling would become my passion and creating content for you all would become my obsession. ⁣
⁣
Thank you all, 3 years - 40 Countries - 148K #WanderWithSkyArmy, I am nothing without your love and Support. We got verified today, and it’s a huge milestone for me and this community!! ⁣
⁣
उम्मीद करता हूँ आपका प्यार बना रहेगा।क्योंकि आप हो तो हम हैं और हम हैं तो यह जहाँ।

latestIgtvVideos.title: RAIDING THE HIMALAYAS ~ My entry to #GoProCreatorSummit final challange🤙🏼
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
4 days, 2 Gypsy's, 1 Himalayan Bike & 180km offroading on some of the most dangerous roads in the world, camping in the wilderness & surviving the ultracold temperatures to reach Chandra Taal and Kunzum Pass in Spiti Valley.⁣
'RAIDING THE HIMALAYAS' is my submission for the #GoProCreatorSummit 2020.⁣
⁣
It is an honour to be a part of this summit as GoPro invited 60 top creators of the world to join, and I get to showcase our HIMALAYAS to the world. Hit that like button and share, share, share!! ⁣
⁣
#GoProHero9 #WanderWithSky #DreamsDoComeTrue

latestPosts.caption:
Spiti Valley = playground 🏂♥️

This one… felt different.
Felt earned.

#backcountry #snowboarding

Life is 10% what happens… and 90% how you take it. 🧿

Same situation.
Different mindset.
Different outcome.

Sometimes it’s not about what life throws at you — it’s about how you choose to respond.

🎧 @maanpanu_

#Thelastletter #wanderwithsky

...yet this made me want more ❤️‍🩹

Barbed wire ne gear aur mujhe phada - khoon baha aur 3km abhi bhi baaki tha. Us din main bilkul toot gaya tha — physically, mentally. Lekin shayad yahi hota hai jab koi cheez tumhare andar se kuch build karti hai. Toot ke hi toh dekha jaata hai ki kitna dard bardaasht kar sakte ho. Aur usi din ne mujhe zinda rehna sikhaya — taaki agli baar aur bada khel khel sakoon. 🏔️

also wearing my @awara_in nomad tee. 

Aur Awaraon… Part 4 aa raha hai.

#AurAwaraon #Snowboarding #BackcountrySnowboarding #Gulmarg #Kashmir

Awara hoon.. zameen pe tikta nahi 🤫🥵

#WanderWithSky #Skydiving

Sethan ne confidence diya aur Gulmarg ne aukaat dikhayi.

Un-learn karo. Re-learn karo. Tabhi pro bante hain. 🏂
Aur Awaraon… ready for part 3?

#WanderWithSky #snowboarding #india #kashmir #gulmarg

Aur Awaraon… 🏴‍☠️

Backcountry. No groomed slopes. Har run ke liye 30 min ki chadhai.
Pehla din — sirf girna. 3-4 din baad — kuch click hua.

Yahi tha mera snowboarding school. 🏔️

Aur phir main Gulmarg gaya — aur aukaat pata chal gayi. 😅
Iss series mein woh sab aane waala hai. Watch out. 👀

#AurAwaraon #WanderWithSky #Snowboarding

Smooth huh? I take my job too seriously 🔥😂

What a day spent with the legend @abdofeghali at the #RedBullMotoJam. Absolute legend.

Made in India 🇮🇳

The privilege of calling myself a Hindustani is something I carry with immense pride — and this tattoo is exactly what it represents.

No matter where I go in the world, this will always remain my mark of manufacturing. 🫂😂

Jai Hind 🇮🇳

latestPosts.caption:
Abe “over-acting” paglu. 🫂🧿

Blessed to experience Gombok Rangan in March, yes last week — when everything is white, silent, and completely untouched.
Moments like these remind you how rare it is to witness places before the world discovers them. 😇❄️

Comfort zone mein kahaniyan nahi banti. 🫂

Blessed to be back exploring Zanskar in peak winter — a place that feels untouched, raw, and magical.
And somehow, just like four years ago, we had it all to ourselves again. 🧿❄️
